config.description: This field is used to grant course / blitz extensions for non "lifetime" purchases.  Grandfathered monthly club members and annual club members are granted extensions.  If they have a "lifetime" purchase (Full Pay 26) then their club status doesn't matter.

config.description:
Yes if grandfathered monthly club member or annual club member or club plus member.

No if none of those statuses. Or if a change in staus from the above to lapsed.
config.label: Extension Status

config.description:
[BLANK]: Default - the Contact's access to our systems has not been suspended/removed.

SUSPEND: If activated, access to the paid content on our systems will be temporarily suspended (the Contact will still be able to access our public content).  This will trigger further automated processes in the Student Invitations Processing app.  Note this is usually triggered by repeated failed billing attempts. This status ALLOWS extension of products if they join CCO Club.

REINSTATE: If activated, access will be restored to all previously suspended paid content.

REMOVE: If activated, access to the paid content on our systems will be 'permanently' removed (the Contact will still be able to access our public content).  This is a NUCLEAR status and will be used very rarely, and would be a manual/management decision rather than an automated one. This status PREVENTS extension of products if they join CCO Club.
config.label: Suspend Systems Access

settings.script:
var Table = ""
var TakenDate = ""
var TotalScore = 0
var AverageScore = 0

Table += "Date | Test Name | Score | Download\n"
Table += "---|---|---|---\n"

for (i=0;i<@[All of [H] Podio Test Results ID Feed](in_150754589_125914549).length;i++){
  TakenDate = moment(@[All of Date Taken](in_125935780_125914549)[i]).format("MM/DD/YYYY")
  TotalScore += @[All of result__percentage](in_125911831_125914549)[i]
  Table += TakenDate+" | "+@[All of test__test_name](in_125911836_125914549)[i]+" | "+@[All of result__percentage](in_125911831_125914549)[i]+"% | "+(@[All of View Results | Students](in_150750509_125914549)[i].split(" ")[0])+"\n"
}

AverageScore = Math.round((TotalScore/@[All of [H] Podio Test Results ID Feed](in_150754589_125914549).length)*100)/100

Table += " | # AVERAGE: |"+AverageScore+"%|"


Table
